description: CompositionTeal blue round neck sleeveless t-shirt with contoured panels, made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a mesh back, black panels on the shoulders and brand logo in black on left chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean At the gym, on the beach or simply enjoying those healthy runs, there's no better way to do it than in this nike t-shirt. Smart to look at, and engineered with Dry-Fit technology to ensure you stay dry and fresh all day, there's nothing better an active man can ask for. The black panels add a dash of style to this tee. Pair it with track pants or shorts and sports shoes to complete that uber cool look.
